name: Z-index utilities
description: Stacking-order utilities bound to the z-index token scale: a numeric ladder plus semantic layers (dropdown, sticky, fixed, modal, popover, tooltip). Not responsive — stacking order is a structural decision, not a breakpoint one.

families.name: z
families.description: Sets the stacking order (z-index) from the numeric ladder, the auto keyword, or a semantic layer.
guidance: Prefer the semantic layers (z-dropdown, z-modal, z-tooltip, ...) over raw numbers so overlapping surfaces stay coordinated system-wide.
z-index only affects positioned elements (position other than static).
